h51ac2543g0248g4ae2g98d9g394851a69f33: A devil's puppet desperate to break his infernal bond? Seems I've heard this story before.

hb4bee20agad19g4afbg8ebeg9d9d44502091: While there's hope of salvation, it's our duty to help.
heba7221dgf513g482fgb603g3be247bfe498: Balduran himself could not have said better.
h525ca90fgc92ag419eg9ec8g3351596f764d: Now gather your wits and gird your loins: we've got a devil to hunt.

h10d056c9g7dc5g4d13g9672g05e320c36cdd: If being a legend were so easy, the bards would hardly bother to sing of them later.
